message:
fix(beads): clean up invalid JSONL entries (dot IDs + cross-project bd- prefix)

- Replace dots with dashes in 453 historical issue IDs (rob.ctx → rob-ctx)
- Remove 46 closed cross-project bd-* entries that violated prefix convention
- Fixes br CLI validation errors caused by legacy ID formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
